title: Gujarat GSEB HSC Result 2026: Class 12 Results To Be Out On May 4 At 10 AM, Check Grading System
description: Gujarat Class 12 Result 2026: As per GSEB norms, students must secure at least a Grade 'D' in every subject to pass the examination. Those receiving Grade 'E1' or 'E2' will have to appear for supplementary exams to improve their scores.
